hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/tools.ts|src/tools.ts|*/src/prompts.ts|src/prompts.ts|*/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md|.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md) d=$(dirname "$f"); while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/package.json" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); done; if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then (cd "$d" && npm run ui:build) >/tmp/devflow-ui-build.log 2>&1 || printf '%s' "devflow-mcp: ui:build failed after editing $f — see /tmp/devflow-ui-build.log" | jq -Rs '{systemMessage: .}'; fi ;; esac
